description: The system analyzes data from acoustic sensors in a District Metered Area (DMA) to pinpoint a non-surfacing water leak.

nodes.task_description: Analyze overnight minimum flow data for the DMA, identifying higher-than-normal flow.

expected_outcome.value: System flags the DMA for potential leakage.

nodes.task_description: Collect and correlate noise data from acoustic sensors within the flagged DMA.

expected_outcome.value: System gathers acoustic data from all relevant sensors.

nodes.task_description: Triangulate the source of the leak noise to a specific point between two sensors.

expected_outcome.value: System provides GPS coordinates for the suspected leak location.

nodes.task_description: Create a work order for a crew to investigate and repair the identified leak.

expected_outcome.value: System dispatches a crew to the precise location.
